alkylation reagent: alkylation of reduced protein with iodoacetamide (IAA, 25 mM)
cleavage agent: using in solution and in gel trypsin digestion approach
fractionation method: generated raw data from three fractions (250 mM, 350 mM and 450 mM SCX fraction)
fragmentation method: normalized higher energy collision dissociation (HCD) of 30 was used for fragmentation
instrument: using Thermo Scientific Q-Exactive orbitrap mass spectrometer
labeling: differential protein expression studies were carried out using iTRAQ labeling method
